title: Programmer Art DX
description: Extending Programmer Art to the present and future!
body:
Welcome to Programmer Art Deluxe!

**Programmer Art DX adapts textures from the latest updates into a texture style that intends to clash less with programmer art.**

Although one of Programmer Art's big traits is long-term inconsistency, this pack aims to create consistency in feeling, and actual textures that need consistency (like bottles) since Mojang isn't supporting Programmer Art with new textures.

As such, PADX should go *over* the built-in Programmer Art resource. It replaces textures from 1.13 onward, even to the first drop of 2026!

Enjoy; I hope you can give this a try. It's still in development and no update's texture set is done, so check back in the future for updates! I know there are many packs like this, so use this one if you like the flavour or era my pack brings over some others.

<details>
<summary>PADX Includes:</summary>

- Ore textures with my own unique shapes
- Pixel-inconsistent allays, vexes, & bats
- Fixes for model issues like horse armour
- Most new status effects
- The new music discs (except otherside which was already fine)
- The new leaf blocks
- Signs and hanging signs
- Blue ice
- Honey
- All the new buckets
- Textures using the netherrack texture
- Nether fungi
- New ingots
- Netherite
- Many more things!

</details>

Full but unorganized feature list on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/programmer-art-dx/) .

<details>
<summary>Enabling add-ons (not the Marketplace kind)</summary>

If you change the `supported_formats` range in `pack.mcmeta` to include the version you are playing on, you can enable:
- New-model redstone torch with more classic textures
- A separate texture for the ghastling
- A redder-wooded soul torch akin to netherite tools

</details>

*ARR license means do not reupload or redistribute this pack in any capacity. If you would like to use my assets or branding for something you publish, get my permission! =]*
